name: Ambrosia Filled Angel Cake
recipeInstructions:
Purchase a large angel food cake, or make one from scratch.
Starting 1 inch down from the top edge, slice off the top of the cake. Set aside for later use.
Using a serrated knife and a spoon, carefully cut out the inside of the cake, leaving a rim around the sides. Do not cut through to the bottom. You will use the cavity for filling.
Filling: Whip the cream and confectioner's sugar until slightly stiff peaks form. Using about half the whipped cream, gently fold in the fruit, coconut, blueberries, and kiwi fruit. Reserve some berries and kiwi for topping. Fill the cake cavity with this mixture. Replace the top slice you cut earlier.
Spread remaining whipped cream evenly over the top and sides of the cake. Sprinkle a few blueberries on top and decorate with overlapping slices of thinly sliced kiwi fruit. You may add other fruits as desired. Refrigerate for at least 4 hours before serving.
